properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Isn't it crazy, we haven't spoken in years We were the closest friends Where did we part, when did the love disappear We thought it'd never end Just a causeless separation A turn in the road of life But now we're nothing more than strangers Don't you think, think it's time, oh…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To build a bridge of love together One stone of hope at a time Let's span the sea that comes between us So join your hand and heart with mine, hey

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The timing is right for our differences to cease O Father, make us one Let's join in the fight to love all humanity Our time has just begun We can use these precious moments To tear apart dividing walls And with those stones of separation Build a bridge, a bridge for all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let's build a bridge of love together One stone of hope at a time Let's span the sea that comes between us So join your hand and heart with mine Come on, let's build a bridge of love together Hey, one stone of hope at a time Ooh, let's span the sea that comes between us So join your hand and heart with mine, listen

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every race and every nation United and unique, ooh… We're all just links in a chain of love I need you, you need me Everybody help me now

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let's build a bridge of love together One stone of hope at a time, ooh… Let's span the sea that comes between us So join your hand and your heart with mine

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hey, let's build a bridge of love together Ooh, one stone of hope at a time (Just one stone) Let's span the sea that comes between us So join your hand and your heart with mine

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Let's build a bridge of love together One stone of hope at a time, ooh… Let's span the sea that comes between us So join your hand and your heart with mine So join your hand and your heart with mine

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Build a bridge of love Build a bridge of love Build a bridge of love together, together…
